name: Paradox (Olivia)
tagline: Conversational AI assistant that automates recruiting workflows
description: Paradox's AI assistant Olivia automates the entire recruiting process through conversational AI. From screening candidates and scheduling interviews to answering FAQs and collecting documents, Olivia handles high-volume hiring tasks 24/7 via text, web chat, and WhatsApp. Paradox is particularly effective for hourly and frontline hiring where speed and candidate experience matter most.
